description: Semantic map of the warehouse environment. v0 uses hand-placed coordinates matching the planned Gazebo warehouse world; it will be regenerated from the SLAM Toolbox map with the same location names once the simulation is up.
layout_notes: Three shelving aisles run south-to-north in the centre of the floor: aisle 1 (west-most), aisle 2 (centre), aisle 3 (east-most). There is no aisle 4 or higher.
Aisles are traversable between their south and north endpoints only; shelving blocks east-west crossing inside an aisle.
The perimeter route connects the four corners along the walls and is always available as an alternative to the aisles.
The charging dock (home/base) is in the southwest corner area. The loading dock is on the southeast side.

charging_dock.desc: Robot home base and charger (southwest area). 'Home', 'base', 'charge' refer here.

loading_dock.desc: Goods-in/out bay on the southeast side. Deliveries and shipments arrive here.

storage_zone_a.desc: Bulk storage zone A, northwest floor.

storage_zone_b.desc: Bulk storage zone B, northeast floor.

office_door.desc: Door to the warehouse office, west wall.
